ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the package does */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL to the package's homepage or documentation */,
  "repository" TEXT /* URL to the package's source code repository */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the package */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the package (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., 'depends', 'imports') */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* Version range of the child package that the parent package depends on */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the dependency is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "import_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package associated with this import method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the package is imported */,
  "import_statement" TEXT /* The exact R statement used to import the package */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicate whether this is the default import method for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score based on resource impact */,
  "risk_assessment" TEXT /* Risk assessment for the package */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Detailed description of resource usage (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "stability_score" REAL /* Stability score based on the RISCA framework */,
  "last_assessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the action occurred */,
  "module" TEXT /* The module or feature where the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the update */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was generated */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the notification has been read */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address or user ID to which the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES package_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_usage_stats" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last date the package was used */,
  "average_usage_time" REAL /* Average time (in seconds) the package was used */,
  "total_usage_time" REAL /* Total time (in seconds) the package has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_stats_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package associated with the contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., maintainer, developer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the contributor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_contributors_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package for which the version is defined */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the version is stable */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
